channel.title: Y. P. Timilsena on Bhim Chaulagain
channel.description: Recent content in Y. P. Timilsena on Bhim Chaulagain

item.title: Toxins, Contaminants, and Adulteration in Food: Current Policies and Practices, and Future Strategies for Nepal. In Agriculture, Natural Resources and Food Security: Lessons from Nepal, eds. J. Timsina, T. Maraseni, J. Adhikari, D. Gauchan, and H. Ojha
